what_it_does: High-fidelity image-to-3D shape synthesis using large-scale rectified-flow transformers and SDF/normal supervision.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance as a strong image-to-3D source for avatar base meshes.
possible_use: Generate Morgan avatar geometry from concept images before rigging with SkinTokens/UniRig/AniGen.
important_notes: Focuses on shape fidelity; still needs texture/material and rigging decisions downstream.
